# Latuos

> Latuos is a digital product sales platform. Sellers pay a 3% platform fee per transaction with no monthly fees. Payments route directly to the seller's own connected Stripe account. The seller remains merchant of record at all times.

- [Full Text](https://latuos.com/llms-full.txt): Full text content grouped by canonical URL.
- [Sitemap](https://latuos.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL inventory for the public site.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://latuos.com/): Latuos is a digital product sales platform. Sellers pay a 3% platform fee per transaction with no monthly fees. Payments route directly to the seller's own connected Stripe account. The seller remains merchant of record at all times.
- [Pricing](https://latuos.com/pricing/): Latuos pricing: 3% platform fee per sale plus Stripe processing. No monthly fees. Connect your own Stripe account and receive payouts directly with control.
- [About](https://latuos.com/about/): Learn who operates Latuos, why it was built, and how its Stripe-first digital product platform works. Latuos is a product of Organo Solutions Ltd in the UK.
- [Fee Calculator](https://latuos.com/fee-calculator/): Calculate your platform fees. Compare Gumroad, Etsy, Payhip, and Notion Marketplace costs vs Latuos's 3% platform fee plus Stripe processing in seconds.

## Platform Comparisons

- [Gumroad Alternative](https://latuos.com/gumroad-alternative/): 10 Gumroad alternatives side by side with 2026 fees, payout models, and the tradeoffs that actually matter when switching from Gumroad to something cheaper.
- [Gumroad Fees Explained](https://latuos.com/gumroad-fees/): Gumroad's 10% flat rate isn't the full picture. See the real per-sale cost including Discover fees, card processing, and payout timing with examples.
- [vs Gumroad](https://latuos.com/vs-gumroad/): Compare Gumroad vs Latuos on fees, payout control, and Stripe ownership so you can choose the better fit for direct digital product sales online today.
- [vs Payhip](https://latuos.com/vs-payhip/): Compare Payhip fees in 2026 across Free, Plus, and Pro. See when Payhip beats Latuos on volume, and when a simple 3% fee stays cheaper for direct sellers.
- [vs Stan Store](https://latuos.com/vs-stan-store/): Compare Stan Store vs Latuos on monthly cost, transaction fees, payout setup, and which platform fits digital product sellers better before switching.
- [vs Whop](https://latuos.com/vs-whop/): Whop fees in 2026 include payment processing, payout charges, automation fees, and add-ons. See the official breakdown and compare Whop with Latuos today.
- [vs Lemon Squeezy](https://latuos.com/vs-lemonsqueezy/): Compare Lemon Squeezy vs Latuos on fees, merchant-of-record status, payout timing, and who owns the Stripe account so you can pick the right fit for your sales.
- [vs Sellfy](https://latuos.com/vs-sellfy/): Compare Sellfy vs Latuos on subscription cost, payout setup, and which model makes more sense for digital product sellers at your volume before switching.
- [vs Etsy](https://latuos.com/vs-etsy/): Compare Etsy vs Latuos on discovery, fees, listing costs, and payout control so you can decide which model fits your digital products best for direct sales.

## Guides

- [Sell Digital Products with No Monthly Fee](https://latuos.com/sell-digital-products-no-monthly-fee/): Compare ways to sell digital products with no monthly fee. See how Latuos, Gumroad, Payhip, Etsy, and Lemon Squeezy differ on costs and control today.
- [Direct Stripe Payouts](https://latuos.com/digital-products-direct-stripe-payouts/): Need direct Stripe payouts for digital products? Compare Latuos, Gumroad, Payhip, and Etsy on payout control, fees, and seller ownership for direct sellers.
- [Stripe Ownership Explained](https://latuos.com/stripe-ownership-explained/): Learn why owning your Stripe account matters when selling digital products. Compare payout control on Latuos, Gumroad, Etsy, Payhip, and Lemon Squeezy.
- [Platform Payout Freeze Risk](https://latuos.com/platform-payout-freeze-risk/): See which digital product platforms can affect seller payouts. Compare payout-freeze risk on Gumroad, Etsy, Lemon Squeezy, Payhip, and Latuos before switching.
- [Gumroad Account Suspended](https://latuos.com/gumroad-account-suspended/): If Gumroad suspended your account, learn why it may happen, what to gather before appeal, and how to check payout status and customer delivery during review.
- [Why Creators Leave Gumroad](https://latuos.com/why-creators-leave-gumroad/): Tired of Gumroad fees? See why some creators consider leaving after 10% + $0.50 cuts, payout dependence, and operational dependency start to matter more.
- [Gumroad Freeze Payouts](https://latuos.com/gumroad-freeze-payouts/): Learn why Gumroad payouts can be delayed, skipped, or held, how the $100 minimum works, and how seller-owned Stripe changes payout dependency for sellers.
- [Platform Shutdown Risk](https://latuos.com/platform-shutdown-risk/): Learn how shutdown risk affects digital product sellers. Compare what survives if a platform disappears and why Stripe ownership changes the outcome long term.
- [Best Platform for New Creators](https://latuos.com/best-platform-new-creators/): Choosing your first digital product platform? Compare fees, payout control, and risk across Gumroad, Payhip, Etsy, Lemon Squeezy, and Latuos before you launch.
- [Best Platform to Sell Digital Downloads](https://latuos.com/best-platform-sell-digital-downloads/): Compare the best platforms to sell digital downloads in 2026. See fees, payout control, and which setup fits your products, pricing, and audience best.
- [Lowest Fee Digital Product Platform](https://latuos.com/lowest-fee-digital-product-platform/): Find the lowest-fee platform for digital products in 2026. Compare Gumroad, Payhip, Etsy, Lemon Squeezy, and Latuos on real pricing at common price points.
- [Control Payouts for Digital Products](https://latuos.com/control-payouts-digital-products/): Learn how payout control works for digital sellers. Compare platform-held balances with seller-owned Stripe setups like Latuos before you choose a storefront.
- [Direct Creator Payouts](https://latuos.com/direct-creator-payouts/): Compare creator platforms by payout model, fee structure, and who controls the payment account across direct-payout and merchant-of-record setups today.

## Product-Specific Pages

- [Sell Notion Templates](https://latuos.com/sell-notion-templates/): Compare the best platforms to sell Notion templates in 2026. See fee math, payout control, and why Stripe ownership matters to sellers who sell direct.
- [Sell Canva Templates](https://latuos.com/sell-canva-templates/): Compare the best platforms to sell Canva templates in 2026. See fee tradeoffs, payout control, and which setup fits template sellers best for creators.
- [Sell Digital Art](https://latuos.com/sell-digital-art/): Compare where to sell digital art in 2026. See how Etsy, Gumroad, Payhip, and Latuos differ on fees, discovery, and payout control for independent artists.
- [Sell Printables](https://latuos.com/sell-printables/): Compare platforms for selling printables in 2026. See how Etsy, Gumroad, Payhip, and Latuos differ on fees, payout control, and fit for independent sellers.
- [Sell Ebooks](https://latuos.com/sell-ebooks/): Learn where to sell eBooks in 2026, from Amazon KDP to direct storefronts. Compare fee math, payout control, formats, and setup tradeoffs for creators.
- [Gumroad Alternative for Templates](https://latuos.com/gumroad-alternative-templates/): Looking for a Gumroad alternative for templates? Compare fees, payout control, and fit for template creators selling through their own audience today.
- [Migrate Notion Templates from Gumroad](https://latuos.com/migrate-notion-templates-from-gumroad/): Move your Notion templates from Gumroad to a lower-fee Stripe-first setup. See the migration path, fee math, and payout-control changes for sellers today.
- [Is Gumroad Safe](https://latuos.com/is-gumroad-safe/): Is Gumroad safe for buyers and sellers? Compare payment security, payout rules, account review risk, and how seller-owned Stripe reduces dependency now.
- [Gumroad vs Stripe Direct](https://latuos.com/gumroad-vs-stripe-direct/): Gumroad takes 10% + $0.50 per sale with controlled payouts. Stripe Direct costs 2.9% + 30¢ with instant access to funds. Full fee and control comparison.

## Optional

- [Resources](https://latuos.com/resources/): Decision pages, fee comparisons, and payout-control guides for creators comparing Latuos, Gumroad, Etsy, Payhip, Lemon Squeezy, Whop, and more on fees.
